mapper.select: SELECT h.id AS homeworkId, h.title AS title, h.description AS description, h.type AS type, h.activity_tag AS activityTag, h.total_score AS totalScore, h.forbid_late AS forbidLate, h.deadline AS deadline, -- 已批改数：status = 2 COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN hs.status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS gradedCount, -- 待批改数：status = 1 COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN hs.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS ungradedCount, -- 课程总选课人数：从 user_course 表统计 role=2（学生）的记录数 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_course uc WHERE uc.course_id = h.course_id AND uc.role = 2) AS totalCount FROM homework h -- LEFT JOIN 保证即使这门课还没有任何提交记录，作业行也能出现在结果里 LEFT JOIN homework_submit hs ON hs.homework_id = h.id WHERE h.course_id = #{courseId} GROUP BY h.id, h.title, h.description, h.type, h.activity_tag, h.total_score, h.forbid_late, h.deadline, h.publish_time -- 按发布时间倒序：最新作业在最上面（与 B_homework.md 列表约定一致） ORDER BY h.publish_time DESC, h.id DESC
